title: Task outcome: Read-only audit of scripts/verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs and whether the new/modified live ver
summary: Read-only audit found that scripts/verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs is a useful real-vault evidence gate but does not prove real Codex desktop dispatch. The accepted source fields are emitted by the hook itself and can also be produced by installer/diagnostic/manual synthetic wrapper invocations. Additional gaps include missing submitted/completed correlation because submitted events lack task_id, fallback to unrelated completed events, no parent-process or challenge attestation, no proof that injected context reached the model, and loose hook registration checks.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Read-only audit found that scripts/verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs is a useful real-vault evidence gate but does not prove real Codex desktop dispatch. The accepted source fields are emitted by the hook itself and can also be produced by installer/diagnostic/manual synthetic wrapper invocations. Additional gaps include missing submitted/completed correlation because submitted events lack task_id, fallback to unrelated completed events, no parent-process or challenge attestation, no proof that injected context reached the model, and loose hook registration checks.
request: Read-only audit of scripts/verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs and whether the new/modified live verifier approach proves real Codex app dispatch versus synthetic hook invocation. Identify gaps and exact improvements. Do not edit files.
decisions: Do not edit repository files during this audit.
Treat verify:codex-live as evidence of hook-shaped artifacts, not as hard proof of Codex app dispatch.

Recommend adding a per-hook-run id/challenge, launcher provenance from the PowerShell wrapper, strict submitted/completed/report correlation, and optional live finish_task proof for closed-loop verification.
next_steps: Add hook_run_id to codex_prompt_submitted, codex_preflight_completed, and live reports, then require it in verify-codex-live-preflight.mjs.
Generate or require a high-entropy challenge token for live prompts and match it exactly rather than by loose snippet substring.
Capture bounded parent-process provenance in the PowerShell wrapper and have the verifier distinguish Codex desktop parentage from installer/diagnostic/manual launches.
Add a live closed-loop verifier mode that requires task_finished for the same hook-created task_id to prove the agent saw and used injected context.

Additional gaps include missing submitted/completed correlation because submitted events lack task_id, fallback to unrelated completed events, no parent-process or challenge attestation, no proof that injected context reached the model, and loose hook registration checks.
